description: CompositionTwo-tone grey shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with double button cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest, a full buttoned placket and a curved hemFitSlimWash careWash dark colours separatelyHand wash or machine wash coldUse mild detergentFlat dry in shadeDo not wring, bleach, iron on printThis impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with chinos or denims and style it with understated accessories.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
